name: file-search
description: MCP server exposing search_files and filter_files tools for fast file-NAME discovery powered by fd (regex/glob) and fzf (fuzzy matching). Use when locating files by name or partial path — not for searching file contents.

defaultPrompt: Use the file-search MCP tools for this task.
